title: Decision: Linker GC prevention via force-link solves rlib exclusion elegantly
description: Backend crates register themselves via inventory::submit\!(), which stores their registration in the rlib's data section. Without forcing the linker to include the rlib, the linker may drop the entire rlib as 'unused', discarding the inventory registrations (lines 48–50 explain this). The force-link solution (use crate as _;) is a clean lingua franca: no custom build scripts, no linker flags, no features beyond standard Cargo. The alternative of shipping registrations in code paths the linker can't drop (e.g. calling a dummy function) would pollute the code. This approach isolates the linking concern to the umbrella crate, leaving each backend simple and unaware of the linker's GC behavior.
